query: SELECT c.id, c.customerName, c.channelUserId, c.channel, c.createdAt, m.content, m.role FROM conversations c LEFT JOIN messages m ON m.conversationId = c.id WHERE c.channel = 'line' ORDER BY c.createdAt DESC LIMIT 10;
